string.text:
AK-107 assault rifle was developed at the Izhevsk Machine-Building Plant based on AK74M. Belongs to the "hundred series" of AK rifles. Features balanced recoil system previously used in AL-7 and AEK-971 models. Balanced mechanism improves burst accuracy from unstable positions by 15-20% compared to AK74M. This system was later abandoned. In 2011, IZHMASH demonstrated upgraded AK-107 as potential AK74M replacement. Balanced system removed, features new receiver cover with integrated Picatinny rail for optics. Rear sight replaced with adjustable diopter instead of traditional U-notch.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Attachments: 
 %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: Rotor-43
 %c[ui_gray_2] Optics: Picatinny/Weaver and Dovetail rails
 %c[ui_gray_2] Underbarrel: GP-25 "Kostyor"
 %c[ui_gray_2]COMPATIBLE MOD KITS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Custom, Specialized weapon mod kits

AK-107 assault rifle was developed at the Izhevsk Machine-Building Plant based on AK74M. Belongs to the "hundred series" of AK rifles. Features balanced recoil system previously used in AL-7 and AEK-971 models. Balanced mechanism improves burst accuracy from unstable positions by 15-20% compared to AK74M. This system was later abandoned. In 2011, IZHMASH demonstrated upgraded AK-107 as potential AK74M replacement. Balanced system removed, features new receiver cover with integrated Picatinny rail for optics. Rear sight replaced with adjustable diopter instead of traditional U-notch.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Attachments: 
 %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: Rotor-43
 %c[ui_gray_2] Optics: Picatinny/Weaver and Dovetail rails
 %c[ui_gray_2] Underbarrel: None

AK-107 assault rifle was developed at the Izhevsk Machine-Building Plant based on AK74M. Belongs to the "hundred series" of AK rifles. Features balanced recoil system previously used in AL-7 and AEK-971 models. Balanced mechanism improves burst accuracy from unstable positions by 15-20% compared to AK74M. This system was later abandoned. In 2011, IZHMASH demonstrated upgraded AK-107 as potential AK74M replacement. Balanced system removed, features new receiver cover with integrated Picatinny rail for optics. Rear sight replaced with adjustable diopter instead of traditional U-notch.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Attachments: 
 %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: Rotor-43
 %c[ui_gray_2] Optics: Picatinny/Weaver and Dovetail rails
 %c[ui_gray_2] Underbarrel: None
 %c[ui_gray_2]COMPATIBLE MOD KITS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Specialized weapon mod kit

AK-107 assault rifle was developed at the Izhevsk Machine-Building Plant based on AK74M. Belongs to the "hundred series" of AK rifles. Features balanced recoil system previously used in AL-7 and AEK-971 models. Balanced mechanism improves burst accuracy from unstable positions by 15-20% compared to AK74M. This system was later abandoned. In 2011, IZHMASH demonstrated upgraded AK-107 as potential AK74M replacement. Balanced system removed, features new receiver cover with integrated Picatinny rail for optics. Rear sight replaced with adjustable diopter instead of traditional U-notch.
 Modified with "Ranger" kit for night operations - caliber conversion and enhanced optic with thermal vision. Camouflage optimized for Chernobyl Exclusion Zone environments.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Attachments: 
 %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: Rotor-43
 %c[ui_gray_2] Optics: Integrated optic with thermal vision
 %c[ui_gray_2] Underbarrel: None

AK-107 assault rifle was developed at the Izhevsk Machine-Building Plant based on AK74M. Belongs to the "hundred series" of AK rifles. Features balanced recoil system previously used in AL-7 and AEK-971 models. Balanced mechanism improves burst accuracy from unstable positions by 15-20% compared to AK74M. This system was later abandoned. In 2011, IZHMASH demonstrated upgraded AK-107 as potential AK74M replacement. Balanced system removed, features new receiver cover with integrated Picatinny rail for optics. Rear sight replaced with adjustable diopter instead of traditional U-notch.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Attachments: 
 %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: Rotor-43
 %c[ui_gray_2] Optics: Picatinny/Weaver and Dovetail rails
 %c[ui_gray_2] Underbarrel: None
 %c[ui_gray_2]COMPATIBLE MOD KITS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Specialized weapon mod kit
